question: The chart shows the annual budget distribution of City A in various sectors. Based on this data, which of the following conclusions can be made?

options.A: The budget allocated to Others is the largest among all sectors.
options.B: The budget allocated to Education is the largest among all sectors.
options.C: The budget allocated to Infrastructure is larger than that for Healthcare.
options.D: The budget allocated to Safety is the smallest among all sectors.

explanation: This pie chart uses dual encoding: slice angle represents percentage, and the radius also varies with percentage, so slice area differences are exaggerated. That can make the largest category look overly dominant. Others: 45%; Education: 20%; Safety: 15%; Healthcare: 10%; Infrastructure: 10%.
